title: sida alba
intro: Sida alba, also known as White Heartleaf or White Sida, is a perennial herb belonging to the Malvaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The medicinal properties of Sida alba lie in its roots, leaves, and flowers, which are rich in flavonoids, terpenoids, and alkaloids, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sida alba include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as support digestive health. Sida alba is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its roots, leaves, or flowers in water, and is also used in various herbal preparations, such as capsules, tinctures, and ointments.
